description: Phase 2.2 Writing Room: role definitions, job types, workflow states, and lock policy for scripts.

showrunner.description: Owns the overall vision of the production; final creative authority below the owner.

story_architect.description: Designs story architecture, act structure, and beat sheets.

screenwriter.description: Writes scene outlines and full screenplay scenes.

dialogue_writer.description: Writes and refines dialogue blocks, including delivery and timing estimates.

continuity_editor.description: Checks scene-to-scene continuity of characters, props, geography, and timeline.

cultural_guardian.description: Reviews scripts for cultural accuracy and respect; never fabricates cultural content.
cultural_guardian.notes: When cultural accuracy is uncertain, the item is flagged and held for elder consultation rather than guessed at.

script_supervisor.description: Tracks script state, revisions, approvals, and the lock lifecycle.

table_read_critic.description: Reads the script aloud in character and critiques pacing, tone, and dialogue naturalness.

lock_policy.description: A locked script is immutable content: it may be archived or revised into a new unlocked revision, but never overwritten in place.
